description: A flat-design infographic slide matching the DHS AI 'Roles and Responsibilities Framework' series, on a deep-blue gradient background. The white all-caps headline reads 'CLOUD AND COMPUTE INFRASTRUCTURE,' with an italic white subhead: 'The technology powering online services, such as data storage in the cloud and the processing of information.' A horizontal connector line with a circular node branches down to three white card panels with light-blue labels: (1) an illustration of dark server racks/data center labeled 'Hardware and Servers'; (2) a blue cloud with a padlock icon above two desktop monitors showing locked-folder icons, labeled 'Cloud Services'; and (3) an isometric cluster of a glowing processor chip surrounded by floating tech icons (database, lightbulb, charts, camera) connected by circuit lines, labeled 'Computing Power.' A lighter-blue band across the bottom contains white body text: 'The new DHS Roles and Responsibilities Framework encourages providers to secure the digital environments where AI systems are developed and deployed.' The circular DHS seal sits at bottom-right. Visual style: clean corporate/government infographic with flat and isometric vector icons, sans-serif type, cool blue palette. Messaging technique: explanatory policy/cybersecurity communication projecting technical competence. Target audience: cloud/compute infrastructure providers, critical-infrastructure operators, and the informed public. This is a designed infographic, not a meme.
notable_text: CLOUD AND COMPUTE INFRASTRUCTURE | The technology powering online services, such as data storage in the cloud and the processing of information | Hardware and Servers / Cloud Services / Computing Power | The new DHS Roles and Responsibilities Framework encourages providers to secure the digital environments where AI systems are developed and deployed.
